stories.title: View changed files after implementation
stories.goal: see a list of all files changed during implementation
stories.benefit: understand the scope of what was built

acceptance_criteria.then: all modified/added/deleted/renamed files are listed with their change type

acceptance_criteria.when: the generator diffs against the base branch via git merge-base
acceptance_criteria.then: the complete set of changes since branching is captured
both old and new paths are shown

stories.title: Understand why each file changed
stories.goal: see a 1-2 line rationale for each changed file
stories.benefit: quickly understand the purpose of each change without reading the code

acceptance_criteria.given: a file appears in the change list
acceptance_criteria.then: a 1-2 line rationale is included describing why the file was changed
the rationale describes its purpose

stories.title: Trace changes back to requirements
stories.goal: see each changed file mapped to the FR/AC identifiers it addresses

acceptance_criteria.given: tasks.md contains trace annotations for a file
acceptance_criteria.then: the FR/AC IDs from tasks.md are mapped to it

acceptance_criteria.given: tasks.md does not cover a file
acceptance_criteria.when: the generator falls back to commit messages
acceptance_criteria.then: FR/AC IDs found in commit messages for that file are mapped

acceptance_criteria.given: neither tasks.md nor commit messages match
acceptance_criteria.when: the generator falls back to code comments
acceptance_criteria.then: FR/AC IDs found in code comments are mapped

acceptance_criteria.given: no tracing source matches a file
acceptance_criteria.then: it is flagged as untraced
all FR-NNN and AC-NNN-NN identifiers are extracted as the valid set

stories.title: See test results at a glance
stories.goal: see test pass/fail counts and coverage included in the summary
stories.benefit: confirm the implementation is solid without re-running tests

acceptance_criteria.then: test pass/fail counts are included
coverage percentage is included

stories.title: Read a human-friendly summary
stories.goal: see the summary displayed as a brief table after phase 06 and saved as a persistent markdown artifact
stories.benefit: get immediate feedback and reference it later

acceptance_criteria.then: a metrics header (files modified, new files, FRs traced, test counts) is shown followed by a file table
it is saved to docs/requirements/{artifact_folder}/change-summary.md
untraced files are clearly distinguished from traced files

stories.title: Provide machine-readable change data
stories.goal: have a versioned JSON file with structured change data
stories.benefit: reliably parse it for external integrations

acceptance_criteria.then: it is saved to .isdlc/change-summary.json
it contains a schema_version field with value 1.0
it is valid JSON under all conditions
each entry includes path, change_type, rationale, traced_requirements array, and tracing_source

stories.title: Survive failures gracefully
stories.goal: have the generator produce partial output when data sources are unavailable
stories.benefit: my workflow is never blocked by a summary generation failure

acceptance_criteria.then: it falls back to state.json artifact data and emits a warning
all files are marked untraced and a warning is emitted
it falls back to commit messages and code comments for tracing
test results section is omitted with a warning
it logs a warning and exits cleanly without blocking the workflow

stories.title: Automatic generation with no interaction
stories.goal: have the change summary generated automatically when phase 06 completes
stories.benefit: get the summary without any extra steps

acceptance_criteria.then: the change summary generator is invoked automatically
no user prompts or menus are presented
the next phase proceeds without delay
